General.Name: Landsea Green Life Svc Co Ltd
General.Description: Landsea Green Life Service Company Limited provides property management, community value-added, and value-added services in China. The company provides apartment operation and management services to white-collar apartments, youth apartments, light luxury serviced apartments, staff accommodation, ancillary commercial, and other products and services. It also offers security, cleaning, gardening and landscaping, car parking management, and daily repair and maintenance services. In addition, the company provides value-added services, such as sales assistance comprising visitors' reception, onsite cleaning, security, repair, and maintenance services; preliminary consultancy services and other pre-delivery; and property agency services. Further, it offers house cleaning and renovation, and home repair and maintenance services; public resource management services, including public space leasing and advertising; leasing and sale of properties, sale of car parking spaces and transfer of rights of car parking spaces. Additionally, the company is involved in the provision of fitness, engineering, real estate brokerage, management consultancy, and advertising services. Its project portfolio comprises residential properties, commercial and office buildings, rental apartments, public facilities, industrial parks, and bank branches. The company serves property owners and residents, and non-property owners. The company was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Nanjing, China.

2.Name: Mr. Chao  Liu
2.Title: VP in Charge of Operations & Board Secretary
